name: Cognitive Dual Engine Plugin
description: System 1/System 2 dual-engine cognitive routing plugin. Based on DeepMind representational geometry research and Stanford FLARE planning framework, implementing automatic complexity routing and lookahead planning at the OpenClaw event loop level.

system2Threshold.description: Composite complexity threshold for triggering System 2 FLARE planning (0.0-1.0)

flareMaxDepth.description: FLARE lookahead tree maximum depth k. Deeper = better global vision, but token cost grows linearly.

flareBranchFactor.description: Maximum candidate action expansions per node. Recommended to combine with action pruning to control search space.

flareSimulationsPerNode.description: Trajectory simulations per node, used for UCB variance control in statistical estimation.
